name: boss-auto-greeter
description: Windows-first local Electron app skeleton for BOSS Auto Greeter

scripts.check:core: node --check electron/main.js && node --check electron/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js
scripts.build: node -e "console.error('Build packaging is not configured yet; no build artifact will be produced. Use npm run dev for local run.'); process.exit(1)"
